# d-nd-seed

> A cognitive system for AI coders. Hooks, skills, memory, safety guards. Install it in your project — the AI coder reads it and configures itself.

## What it does

- Persistent memory across sessions (survives context compaction)
- Safety guard that catches destructive operations before execution
- System awareness at session start (repo state, API health, messages)
- 103 skills: 17 plugin, 42 for coding agents, 44 for chat AI (bilingual)
- Cognitive kernels that shape how the AI thinks (not just what it does)
- Godel plugin: inverted oracle that reveals hidden assumptions
- Parametric installer with profiles for different environments

## Quick start

```
git clone https://github.com/GrazianoGuiducci/d-nd-seed.git
cd d-nd-seed
./install.sh profiles/example.json
```

## Key files

- GUIDE.md — AI entry point (map, setup, manual)
- install.sh — Parametric installer
- templates/hooks/ — 17 hook templates
- skills/coder/ — 42 coding agent skills
- skills/thinker/ — 44 chat AI skills (IT/EN)
- kernels/ — Cognitive system prompts
- plugins/godel/ — Inverted oracle with domain configs
- plugins/d-nd-core/ — Core plugin (safety, awareness, messaging)
- docs/ — 16 operational guides

## Works with

Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini, and any AI coder that reads project files.

## Links

- https://seed.d-nd.com — Documentation
- https://d-nd.com — D-ND framework and research
- https://github.com/GrazianoGuiducci/d-nd-seed — This repository
